assistant_message.content:
{
  "finding_id": "openscap_017",
  "rule_id": "Ensure PAM Enforces Password Requirements - Minimum Lowercase Characters",
  "category": "safe_to_remediate",
  "confidence": 0.96,
  "rationale": "Password complexity rule that can be safely adjusted via configuration without risking system lockout.",
  "risk_factors": [
    "Misconfigured lcredit may weaken password policy",
    "Potential for weaker passwords if set incorrectly"
  ],
  "safe_next_steps": [
    "Edit /etc/security/pwquality.conf or files in /etc/security/pwquality.conf.d/ to set lcredit to desired value (e.g., lcredit = -1)",
    "Validate changes with 'pamtester' or test login to ensure PAM loads correctly",
    "Reload the PAM configuration or restart the relevant service if needed"
  ],
  "requires_reboot": false,
  "touches_authn_authz": true,
  "touches_networking": false,
  "touches_filesystems": false
}
